input.description: Top 3 rows by deal_amount from pipeline_with_earnings
input.sql: SELECT account_name, ticker, deal_amount FROM AMPUP_DEMO.AMPUP.pipeline_with_earnings ORDER BY deal_amount DESC LIMIT 3

content.content:
3 row(s) returned.

ACCOUNT_NAME,TICKER,DEAL_AMOUNT

Solstice Motors,SLST,365000.00
Avionix Aviation,AVXC,262500.00
Ridepoint,RDPT,185000.00

content.text: Now I need to find the opportunity ID for the Solstice Motors deal to propose an email draft. Let me search for it.
